2246560.name: Wake
2246560.description:
Explore the islands of Wake in a sea plane. Scattered throughout the rolling hills, along steep cliffs, and in complex cave networks, are the beacons of a lost communication system. By transporting signals between these towers, it can be restored, but that might only be achieved by the most skilled of seaplane pilots.

The game starts in a free roaming mode where you can explore the environment and get familiar with controlling the plane. There are racing challenges where you can set personal high scores. To start a race visit one of the main towers.
2246560.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
